description: Second corpus trivium after the BFZ triple-thesis triangle, but structurally DIFFERENT. The Dark Vassal trio is a single-register-corrupted-labor CHAIN, not a thesis-triangle — Bandai's adjacent collector-number positioning (BT4-064 / BT4-065 / BT4-066) plus shared 'Dark Vassal' card-name prefix plus canonical chronological-deployment-order positioning (Tambourine Saga-opening, Cymbal Saga-middle, Drum Saga-climactic) gives the cycle its single-axis chain topology. Each card receives N-1 = 2 bullets per the connections-standard cycle treatment. Total bullets written: 6 (Cymbal's pre-existing Yajirobe bullet preserved; 2 new sibling bullets per card). Three cards, six new bullets, fully mirrored. Designer-coordination citation is dbs-cardgame.com BT4-064/065/066 per-card pages plus Dragon Ball Wiki per-character pages for Tambourine, Cymbal, Drum.
citations: [Dragon Ball manga: King Piccolo Saga chapters 134-194 (Toriyama, Shueisha, 1976)]
